scripts.build:release-assets: npm run ensure:icons && npm run bundle:backend
scripts.package: npm run build:release-assets && npm run build && electron-builder -c ./electron-builder.config.mjs
scripts.package:win: npm run build:release-assets && npm run build && electron-builder -c ./electron-builder.config.mjs --win
scripts.package:mac: npm run build:release-assets && npm run build && electron-builder -c ./electron-builder.config.mjs --mac
scripts.package:linux: npm run build:release-assets && npm run build && electron-builder -c ./electron-builder.config.mjs --linux
